title: FAQ
excerpt: description: Frequently asked questions about Workers KV, including consistency, rate limits, and access methods. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Frequently asked questions regarding Workers KV. Yes, you can use Workers KV outside of Workers by using the [REST API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/kv/) or the associated [Cloudflare SDKs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/api/reference/sdks/) for the REST API. It is important to note the [limits of the REST API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/api/reference/limits/) that apply.
